# The Laundry Bag (TLB)

> India's leading commercial laundry, dry-cleaning and linen-management brand for luxury hotels, resorts, hospitals and institutions. Founded by Shourya Jain in Raipur, Chhattisgarh in 2013.

The Laundry Bag operates on-premise, off-site and linen-rental models from its Raipur headquarters and central processing unit, serving clients across 18 Indian cities.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.thelaundrybag.co.in/): Commercial laundry & linen programmes for hotels and hospitals
- [About](https://www.thelaundrybag.co.in/about): Company journey since 2013
- [Clients](https://www.thelaundrybag.co.in/clients): Hotel, resort and hospital partners
- [Locations](https://www.thelaundrybag.co.in/locations): 18-city footprint and Raipur HQ
- [Contact](https://www.thelaundrybag.co.in/contact): New business enquiries and office details
- [FAQ](https://www.thelaundrybag.co.in/faq): Common questions about services and coverage
- [Press](https://www.thelaundrybag.co.in/press): Media coverage and milestones
